title: Contracting & Construction
metaTitle: Invoicing & Project Billing for Contractors · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Free quoting plus progress invoices, purchase orders, payroll and project costing for contractors and builders. Bill milestones, control cost, get paid. Works worldwide.
keywords: contractor software, construction invoicing, progress billing, project costing, contractor erp, purchase orders, contractor payroll, retention invoicing
heroTitle: Bill the milestone, control the job cost
heroSubtitle: Quote a project, bill it in stages, track materials and labour against budget, and get paid without chasing. Paper & Pen brings your estimates, costs and cash into one place.
heroBullets: Materials, labour and margin per job

features.title: Detailed estimates
features.desc: Build itemised quotes with materials and labour, then convert to a project.

features.title: Progress billing
features.desc: Invoice by milestone or percentage complete, with retention handled cleanly.

features.title: Purchase orders
features.desc: Order materials against a job and post the cost where it belongs.

features.title: Labour & payroll
features.desc: Run payroll and attribute wages to the right project for true job cost.

features.title: Job costing
features.desc: Compare actual material and labour cost to your estimate, live.

features.title: Payment reminders
features.desc: Automatic, polite reminders chase overdue certificates so you don't have to.

sections.title: Estimates that become the job
sections.body: Win the work with a clear, itemised estimate, then turn the approved version straight into a project without re-typing a single line. Bill in stages as work completes, by milestone or percentage, and handle retention so the final account adds up. Your client gets a professional certificate; you keep one clean trail from tender to final payment.
items: Itemised estimates with materials and labour
Retention tracked to the final account

sections.eyebrow: Know the job is making money
sections.title: Cost and margin, job by job
sections.body: A busy site can hide a loss-making job. Paper & Pen attributes every purchase order, supplier bill and payroll run to the project, then shows actual cost against your estimate as the work progresses. You see the margin before the job is over, not after. Built in Oman with native OMR, AED and SAR and 5% VAT, and ready for USD, EUR or any market and tax rate.
items: Material and labour cost per project
Any currency, any tax rate, VAT ready

faqs.q: Can I invoice a project in stages?
faqs.a: Yes. Bill by milestone or by percentage complete, with retention handled, so each certificate is clean and the final account reconciles.

faqs.q: Can I track cost against my estimate?
faqs.a: Yes. Purchase orders, supplier bills and payroll attribute to the job, and Paper & Pen shows actual cost against your estimate as work progresses.
Yes. Retention is tracked through progress invoices and carried to the final account, so nothing is missed at handover.

faqs.q: Can I run payroll for site staff?
faqs.a: Yes. The HR and Payroll module runs wages and can attribute labour cost to the right project for accurate job costing.
Sales and Invoicing, including estimates and progress invoices, is free forever. Add Inventory, HR/Payroll and Accounting for full project cost control.

ctaTitle: Build it, bill it, get paid
ctaSub: Start free with estimates and progress invoices, then add Payroll and Accounting for full job costing.
